index.rule.md
children.content:
### home文件改动基本规则

尽量将home内的功能剥离到其他文件，home文件只负责展示和导航。

main.tsx
children.content:
import { StrictMode } from 'react'
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
import 'uno.css'
import '@/App.css'
import App from '@/App'

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <App />
  </StrictMode>,
)

children.name: vite-env.d.ts
index.html
package.json
children.content:
{
  "name": "exam-ai-frontend",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@types/md5": "^2.3.6",
    "@unocss/preset-attributify": "^66.6.8",
    "@unocss/preset-icons": "^66.6.8",
    "@unocss/preset-uno": "^66.6.8",
    "@unocss/transformer-directives": "^66.6.8",
    "@unocss/transformer-variant-group": "^66.6.8",
    "antd": "^6.3.7",
    "axios": "1.6.2",
    "lucide-react": "0.294.0",
    "mathlive": "^0.109.2",
    "md5": "^2.3.0",
    "react": "19.2.0",
    "react-dom": "19.2.0",
    "react-router-dom": "6.20.1",
    "unocss": "^66.6.8"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^25.7.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.2.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^5.2.0",
    "typescript": "5.3.2",
    "vite": "5.2.8"
  },
  "overrides": {
    "lucide-react": {
      "react": "$react",
      "react-dom": "$react-dom"
    }
  }
}

children.name: tsconfig.json
children.content:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "types": ["@types/node"],
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["src"]
}
